positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~romance(basque)).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X0) | ~romance(X1)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    romance(spanish)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~related(basque,X0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    romance(french)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    related(german,spanish)).

cnf(u18,negated_conjecture,
    ~romance(german)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define indo_european(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
